roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOT FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED

/CAL:MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X:APPEARANCE BY ATTORNEY RONNIE WAGNERON BEHALF OF THE S,F,P,D, LEGAL DEPARTMENT,/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FORTHE FOLLOWING REASON: NO APPEARANCE BY THE PETITIONER/

/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/X:THE DA'S MOTION TO AMEND THE PETITION TO ALLEGE VIOLATION #7 - TRESPASSING, IS GRANTED,/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATIONS #2, #4, #5, #7 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:126 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  14  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HISSENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 70 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILL BE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON THURSDAY, MAY 1, 2014,  THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OFHEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE AND ADULT PROBATION HAVE THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 70 DAYS OF TREATMENT,  IF CLIENT FAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 70 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT WITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION,HE MAY BE SUBJECT TO A NEW PETITION BASED UPON A VIOLATIONOF A COURT ORDER,VIOLATION # 1 - ABSCONDING IS DISMISSEDVIOLATION # 3 - PETTY THEFT IS DISMISSEDVIOLATION # 6 - CRIMINAL THREATS IS DISMISSEDCOURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TOREINSTATE PAROLE AS OF 4-4-2014 WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS,/X:PAROLEE ORDEREDTO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT
